name: logistics-ai
description: Logistics Ai tools powered by MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: track_shipment
tools.description: Track a shipment and get current status with location updates.

tools.name: optimize_route
tools.description: Optimize shipping route between two locations with cost and time estimates.

tools.name: warehouse_inventory
tools.description: Manage warehouse inventory with stock levels, reorder alerts, and valuation.

tools.name: estimate_delivery
tools.description: Estimate delivery date and time windows for a shipment.

tools.name: customs_documentation
tools.description: Generate customs documentation requirements and duty estimates.
